metadata.name: TRADETRI Samjho Button Glossary
metadata.notes: All translations need Vadodara native speaker review before production. Audio scripts ready for ElevenLabs Hindi (Niraj voice) and Gujarati (custom voice clone).

categories.order: Entry, Exit, Stop Loss, Target, Square Off
categories.risk: Risk, Hedge, Cool-off, Capital Cap, Emergency Stop

hi.label: मुनाफ़ा
hi.explanation: Trade se kamai hua paisa. Aapne ₹100 mein kharida, ₹120 mein becha — ₹20 munafa.
hi.example: Aaj ka munafa: ₹2,340 — yaani ek din ka khana-naasta nikal gaya.
hi.audio_script: Munafa matlab — trade se kamai hua paisa. Jaise FD mein vyaaj, waise yahan munafa.

gu.label: નફો
gu.explanation: Sauda thi kamavu paisu. Tame ₹100 ma kharidyu, ₹120 ma vechyu — ₹20 nafo.
gu.example: Aaje no nafo: ₹2,340 — yaani ek divas no khana-naasta nikli gayo.
gu.audio_script: Nafo etle — sauda thi kamavu paisu. Jeva FD ma vyaaj, evi rite ahin nafo.

hi.label: नुकसान
hi.explanation: Trade mein gaya hua paisa. Aapne ₹100 mein kharida, ₹90 mein becha — ₹10 nuksan.
hi.example: Aaj ₹500 ka nuksan — ek chai-naashta gaya.
hi.audio_script: Nuksan matlab — trade mein gaya hua paisa. Trading mein hota hai, FD mein nahi.

gu.label: ખોટ
gu.explanation: Sauda ma gayu paisu. Tame ₹100 ma kharidyu, ₹90 ma vechyu — ₹10 khoṭ.
gu.example: Aaje ₹500 ni khoṭ — ek chai-naashta gayo.
gu.audio_script: Khoṭ etle — sauda ma gayu paisu. Trading ma thai, FD ma nathi thato.

hi.label: जीतने का दर
hi.explanation: 100 trade mein se kitne baar profit hua. 76% matlab — 100 mein 76 baar jeete, 24 baar haare.
hi.example: Hamari strategy ka jeetne ka dar 76% — 4 mein 3 baar profit.
hi.audio_script: Jeetne ka dar matlab — 100 trade mein kitni baar paisa kamaya. Jitna zyada utna acha.

gu.label: જીતવાનો દર
gu.explanation: 100 sauda ma kitla vakhat profit thayo. 76% etle — 100 ma 76 vakhat jeetya, 24 vakhat haarya.
gu.example: Aapni strategy no jeetwano dar 76% — 4 ma 3 vakhat profit.
gu.audio_script: Jeetwano dar etle — 100 sauda ma kitla vakhat paisa kamayo. Jetlu vadhare etlu sara.

hi.label: सबसे बड़ा नुकसान
hi.explanation: Worst case mein kitna paisa gir sakta hai. ₹1,00,000 se ₹90,000 sudhi gir gaya — toh drawdown 10%.
hi.example: Is strategy ka sabse bada nuksan 10% — yaani ₹50,000 mein worst case ₹5,000.
hi.audio_script: Sabse bada nuksan matlab — kabhi-kabhi strategy mein paisa girta hai. Kitna gir sakta hai, woh drawdown.

gu.label: સૌથી મોટી ખોટ
gu.explanation: Worst case ma kitlu paisu padi shake. ₹1,00,000 thi ₹90,000 sudhi padi gayo — to drawdown 10%.
gu.example: Aa strategy ni sauthi moti khoṭ 10% — yaani ₹50,000 ma worst case ₹5,000.
gu.audio_script: Sauthi moti khoṭ etle — kadi-kadi strategy ma paisu pade. Kitlu padi shake, e drawdown.

hi.label: जोखिम-इनाम
hi.explanation: ₹1 jokhim lekar kitna inaam mil sakta hai. 1:4 matlab — ₹1 jaaye toh ₹4 milte hain jeetne par.
hi.example: Iss strategy mein 1 ka 4 ratio — ₹100 daav, jeete toh ₹400, haare toh ₹100.
hi.audio_script: Jokhim-Inaam matlab — risk lekar kitna fayda. Jitna zyada inaam, utni acchi strategy.

gu.label: જોખમ-ઈનામ
gu.explanation: ₹1 joom karine kitlu inaam male. 1 nu 4 etle — ₹1 jaay to jeetva par ₹4 male.
gu.example: Aa strategy ma 1 nu 4 ratio — ₹100 daav, jeetya to ₹400, haarya to ₹100.
gu.audio_script: Joom-Inaam etle — risk leyne kitlu phaayadho. Jetlu vadhare inaam, etli sari strategy.

hi.label: मूल धन
hi.explanation: Trading mein lagaya hua asli paisa. Jaise dukaan kholne ke liye paisa chahiye, waise.
hi.example: Iss strategy ke liye ₹50,000 ka mool dhan chahiye.
hi.audio_script: Mool dhan matlab — trading mein laga hua aapka paisa. Iske bina trade nahi ho sakta.

gu.label: મૂળ ધન
gu.explanation: Trading ma laagelu asli paisu. Jeva dukaan kholva mate paisu joiye, evi rite.
gu.example: Aa strategy mate ₹50,000 nu mool dhan joiye.
gu.audio_script: Mool dhan etle — trading ma laagelu tamaru paisu. Aana vagar sauda nathi thato.

hi.label: योजना
hi.explanation: Trade kab kharidna, kab bechna — ka pakka rule. Jaise recipe — same steps, same result.
hi.example: Aaram wali yojana — shaant bazaar mein chalti hai.
hi.audio_script: Yojana matlab — trading karne ka pakka tareeka. Bina yojana ke trade matlab juaa.

gu.label: યોજના
gu.explanation: Sauda kyaare kharidvu, kyaare vechvu — nu pakku rule. Jeva recipe — same steps, same result.
gu.example: Aaram wali yojna — shaant bazaar ma chale.
gu.audio_script: Yojna etle — trading karva no pakku tareeko. Yojna vagar sauda etle juuwo.

hi.label: सौदा चालू
hi.explanation: Trade ka start — jab aapne kharidna ya bechna shuru kiya.
hi.example: Aaj 10 baje sauda chalu kiya, 1 baje band.
hi.audio_script: Sauda chalu matlab — trade ka pehla step. Aap market mein aa gaye.

gu.label: સોદો ચાલુ
gu.explanation: Sauda no shuru — jyaare tame kharidvu ya vechvu shuru karyu.
gu.example: Aaje 10 vagye sauda chalu karyo, 1 vagye band.
gu.audio_script: Sauda chalu etle — sauda no pehlo step. Tame market ma aavi gaya.

hi.label: सौदा बंद
hi.explanation: Trade ka end — jab aapne position close ki, profit/loss decided.
hi.example: 1 baje sauda band — ₹500 munafa ghar le ke chale.
hi.audio_script: Sauda band matlab — trade khatam. Ab profit-loss final, paisa wapas account mein.

gu.label: સોદો બંધ
gu.explanation: Sauda no ant — jyaare tame position close kari, profit/loss nakki.
gu.example: 1 vagye sauda band — ₹500 nafo ghar le gaya.
gu.audio_script: Sauda band etle — sauda khatam. Have profit-loss final, paisu account ma.

hi.label: बचाव की हद
hi.explanation: Itne neeche aaye toh apne aap bech do — aur nuksan se bacho. Ghar mein fire alarm jaisa.
hi.example: ₹100 mein kharida, ₹95 stop loss — bhav ₹95 aaya, apne aap bech, nuksan sirf ₹5.
hi.audio_script: Bachav ki hadd matlab — apna nuksan rok dena. Trading mein sabse important rule.

gu.label: બચાવ ની હદ
gu.explanation: Aaa neeche aave to apoaap vechi de — vadhu khoṭ thi bachavi le. Ghar ma fire alarm jevu.
gu.example: ₹100 ma kharidyu, ₹95 stop loss — bhav ₹95 aavyo, apoaap vechai, khoṭ matra ₹5.
gu.audio_script: Bachav ni hadd etle — pothani khoṭ rok deva ni. Trading ma sauthi important rule.

hi.label: लक्ष्य
hi.explanation: Itna bhav aaye toh apne aap bech do — profit jeb mein. Greed ko rok deta hai.
hi.example: ₹100 mein kharida, ₹110 target — bhav ₹110 aaya, apne aap bech, ₹10 munafa.
hi.audio_script: Lakshya matlab — profit ki manzil. Yahan tak aaya toh nikal jao, aur greed mat karo.

gu.label: લક્ષ્ય
gu.explanation: Aatlu bhav aave to apoaap vechi de — profit jebh ma. Lalach ne rok de.
gu.example: ₹100 ma kharidyu, ₹110 lakshya — bhav ₹110 aavyo, apoaap vechai, ₹10 nafo.
gu.audio_script: Lakshya etle — profit ni manzil. Aahin sudhi aavyo to nikal jao, lalach na karo.

hi.label: सब बंद
hi.explanation: Sari open trades ek saath band kar do. Khaata clear, raat ko tension nahi.
hi.example: 3:15 baje sab band — ab koi position khuli nahi.
hi.audio_script: Sab band matlab — sari trades ek saath khatam. Din ke ant mein safe rehna.

gu.label: બધું બંધ
gu.explanation: Saari open trades ek saath band kari de. Khaatu clear, raate tension nathi.
gu.example: 3:15 vagye badhu band — have koi position khulli nathi.
gu.audio_script: Badhu band etle — saari trades ek saath khatam. Divas na ant ma surakshit raheva.

hi.label: तेज़ी
hi.explanation: Bazaar upar ja raha hai — saand jaise sing maarke uchaal raha. Kharidne ka mood.
hi.example: Aaj Nifty mein tezi — sab kuch hara hai.
hi.audio_script: Tezi matlab — bazaar mein khushi, bhav badh raha. Saand jaisa upar dauda.

gu.label: તેજી
gu.explanation: Bazaar upar jay che — saand jevu shing maarine uchhaade. Kharidva no mood.
gu.example: Aaje Nifty ma tezi — badhu lila che.
gu.audio_script: Tezi etle — bazaar ma khushi, bhav vadhe che. Saand jevu upar daudtu.

hi.label: मंदी
hi.explanation: Bazaar neeche gir raha hai — bhalu jaise punja maarke girata hai. Bechne ka mood.
hi.example: Aaj Sensex mein mandi — sab kuch laal.
hi.audio_script: Mandi matlab — bazaar mein dukh, bhav gir raha. Bhalu jaisa neeche dabaata.

gu.label: મંદી
gu.explanation: Bazaar neeche pade che — bhalu jevu punjo maarine padi gade. Vechva no mood.
gu.example: Aaje Sensex ma mandi — badhu laal che.
gu.audio_script: Mandi etle — bazaar ma dukh, bhav pade che. Bhalu jevu neeche dabaave.

hi.label: उतार-चढ़ाव
hi.explanation: Bhav ka upar-neeche hilna. Zyada hile = zyada risk + zyada mauka. Shaant = boring lekin safe.
hi.example: Aaj market mein bahut utar-chadhav — risky din.
hi.audio_script: Utar-chadhav matlab — bhav ka hilna. Jitna hilta hai, utna roller-coaster.

gu.label: ઉતાર-ચઢાવ
gu.explanation: Bhav nu upar-neeche hilvu. Vadhu hile = vadhu risk + vadhu mauko. Shaant = boring pan safe.
gu.example: Aaje market ma bahu utar-chadhav — risky divas.
gu.audio_script: Utar-chadhav etle — bhav nu hilvu. Jetlu hile, etlu roller-coaster.

hi.label: टेक
hi.explanation: Bhav ka neeche wala level — yahan se neeche girna mushkil. Zameen jaise.
hi.example: Nifty ka tek 25,000 par — yahan se aksar wapas upar jaata hai.
hi.audio_script: Tek matlab — bhav ki zameen. Yahan se neeche girna kam hota hai, log kharidte hain.

gu.label: ટેક
gu.explanation: Bhav nu neeche nu level — ahin thi neeche padvu mushkil. Zameen jevu.
gu.example: Nifty no tek 25,000 par — ahin thi pacho upar jay che.
gu.audio_script: Tek etle — bhav ni zameen. Ahin thi neeche padvu kam, log kharide che.

hi.label: छत
hi.explanation: Bhav ka upar wala level — yahan se upar jaana mushkil. Chhat jaise.
hi.example: Nifty ki chhat 26,000 — yahan aate hi log bechne lagte hain.
hi.audio_script: Chhat matlab — bhav ki ceiling. Yahan rukta hai, log bechte hain, neeche aata hai.

gu.label: છત
gu.explanation: Bhav nu upar nu level — ahin thi upar javu mushkil. Chhat jevu.
gu.example: Nifty ni chhat 26,000 — ahin aave to log vechwa lage.
gu.audio_script: Chhat etle — bhav ni ceiling. Ahin atke, log veche, neeche aave.

hi.label: बढ़ने का टिकट
hi.explanation: Bhav badhega toh paisa kamana — uska ticket. Lottery jaisa, lekin kuch logic ke saath.
hi.example: Nifty ₹25,000 hai, ₹26,000 ka call kharida — bhav ₹26,500 gaya toh kamai.
hi.audio_script: Vadhne ka ticket matlab — Call option. Bhav badhega yahi soch ke khareedte ho.

gu.label: વધવા નું ટિકિટ
gu.explanation: Bhav vadhshe to paisa kamavu — eno ticket. Lottery jevu, paan thodu logic saathe.
gu.example: Nifty ₹25,000 che, ₹26,000 no call kharidyo — bhav ₹26,500 gayo to kamai.
gu.audio_script: Vadhwa nu ticket etle — Call option. Bhav vadhshe e maani ne khareedo cho.

hi.label: गिरने का टिकट
hi.explanation: Bhav giregaa toh paisa kamana — uska ticket. Call ka ulta game.
hi.example: Nifty ₹25,000 hai, ₹24,000 ka put kharida — bhav ₹23,500 gaya toh kamai.
hi.audio_script: Girne ka ticket matlab — Put option. Bhav giregaa yahi soch ke khareedte ho.

gu.label: પડવા નું ટિકિટ
gu.explanation: Bhav padshe to paisa kamavu — eno ticket. Call no ulto game.
gu.example: Nifty ₹25,000 che, ₹24,000 no put kharidyo — bhav ₹23,500 gayo to kamai.
gu.audio_script: Padwa nu ticket etle — Put option. Bhav padshe e maani ne khareedo cho.

hi.label: सौदे का भाव
hi.explanation: Option mein jis bhav par sauda taih hota hai. Bargain ka rate.
hi.example: ₹25,000 strike call — yaani ₹25,000 par sauda fix hoga.
hi.audio_script: Sauda ka bhav matlab — option ka strike price. Yahin par deal hota hai.

gu.label: સોદા નો ભાવ
gu.explanation: Option ma je bhave sauda taih thay che. Bargain no rate.
gu.example: ₹25,000 strike call — yaani ₹25,000 par sauda fix thashe.
gu.audio_script: Sauda no bhav etle — option no strike price. Aahin j deal thay.

hi.label: आख़िरी तारीख़
hi.explanation: Option ki last date — iske baad ticket zero ho jaata hai. Theatre ki movie jaise.
hi.example: Iss option ki aakhri tareekh 28 May — uske baad value zero.
hi.audio_script: Aakhri tareekh matlab — option ki deadline. Iske baad sab khatam, paisa wapas nahi.

gu.label: છેલ્લી તારીખ
gu.explanation: Option ni last date — aa pachi ticket zero thai jay. Theatre ni movie jevu.
gu.example: Aa option ni chhelli taarikh 28 May — pachi value zero.
gu.audio_script: Chhelli taarikh etle — option ni deadline. Aa pachi badhu khatam, paisu pacho nathi.

hi.label: टाइम का छल
hi.explanation: Option roz thoda zero ki taraf jaata hai — ice cube jaise pighal raha. Time aapka dushman hai.
hi.example: Roz ₹2-3 paise apne aap kam — chahe bhav same ho.
hi.audio_script: Time ka chhal matlab — Theta. Option khareedne wala roz thoda paisa kho deta.

gu.label: ટાઈમ નો ચલ
gu.explanation: Option roj thodu zero taraf jay che — barfn jevu pighle che. Time tamaru dushman.
gu.example: Roj ₹2-3 paise apoaap kam — bhale bhav same hoy.
gu.audio_script: Time no chal etle — Theta. Option khareedwa walo roj thodu paisu khoy de.

hi.label: जोखिम
hi.explanation: Paisa khoone ka chance. Trading mein jokhim hota hai — FD mein nahi.
hi.example: Iss strategy mein 10% jokhim — yaani ₹50,000 mein ₹5,000 ka chance.
hi.audio_script: Jokhim matlab — risk. Bina iske kuch nahi milega, lekin sambhal ke.

gu.label: જોખમ
gu.explanation: Paisu khova no chance. Trading ma joom hoy — FD ma nahi.
gu.example: Aa strategy ma 10% joom — yaani ₹50,000 ma ₹5,000 no chance.
gu.audio_script: Joom etle — risk. Aana vagar kai nathi maltu, paan sambhali ne.

hi.label: बीमा
hi.explanation: Mukhya trade ke saath ek aur trade jo bachata hai. Bike chalate time helmet jaise.
hi.example: Long position ka bima — ek put option khareed liya, gir gaya toh bachav.
hi.audio_script: Bima matlab — protection. Mukhya trade gir jaaye toh ye bacha lega.

gu.label: વીમો
gu.explanation: Mukhya sauda saathe ek aur sauda je bachave. Bike chalavva ma helmet jevu.
gu.example: Long position no vimo — ek put option kharidyo, padyu to bachav.
gu.audio_script: Vimo etle — protection. Mukhya sauda padyu to aa bachavi le.

hi.label: दिमाग ठंडा
hi.explanation: 3 nuksan ke baad 24 ghante trading band — emotional trade rokne ke liye. AlgoMitra dilvayega.
hi.example: Aaj 3 baar haare — 24 ghante TRADETRI band, kal fresh dimag se shuru.
hi.audio_script: Dimaag thanda matlab — cool-off. Gussa mein trade nahi karna, paisa double kho dega.

gu.label: દિમાગ ઠંડું
gu.explanation: 3 khoṭ pachi 24 kalak trading band — emotional sauda rokva mate. AlgoMitra dilavshe.
gu.example: Aaje 3 vakhat haarya — 24 kalak TRADETRI band, kale fresh dimag thi shuru.
gu.audio_script: Dimaag thando etle — cool-off. Gussa ma sauda na karo, paisu double khovai jashe.

hi.label: पैसे की हद
hi.explanation: Naye user ke liye max paisa lagane ki hadd. Pehle mahine ₹10,000, dheere-dheere badhega.
hi.example: Pehla mahina ₹10,000 hadd — security ke liye, sikhne ka time.
hi.audio_script: Paisa hadd matlab — capital cap. Naye user ko bachane ka tareeka.

gu.label: પૈસા ની હદ
gu.explanation: Naya user mate max paisu lagavva ni hadd. Pehla mahina ₹10,000, dhire-dhire vadhshe.
gu.example: Pehlo mahino ₹10,000 hadd — security mate, sikhva no time.
gu.audio_script: Paisa ni hadd etle — capital cap. Naya user ne bachavva no tareeko.

hi.label: सब बंद करो
hi.explanation: Laal button — ek tap mein saari position band, naya trade rok. Panic mein safe.
hi.example: Bazaar gir raha — laal button daba, sab band, surakshit.
hi.audio_script: Sab band karo matlab — emergency stop. Har screen pe laal button, panic mein bachav.

gu.label: બધું બંધ કરો
gu.explanation: Laal button — ek tap ma saari position band, navu sauda rok. Panic ma surakshit.
gu.example: Bazaar pade che — laal button dabaavo, badhu band, surakshit.
gu.audio_script: Badhu band karo etle — emergency stop. Dareki screen par laal button, panic ma bachav.

hi.label: अपने आप बंद
hi.explanation: Din ke ant mein 3:15 par sari trades apne aap band. Raat ko tension nahi.
hi.example: Sham 3:15 — apne aap band, account safe, neend acchi.
hi.audio_script: Apne aap band matlab — auto square-off. TRADETRI khud sambhalti, tension nahi.

gu.label: આપોઆપ બંધ
gu.explanation: Divas na ant ma 3:15 par saari sauda apoaap band. Raate tension nathi.
gu.example: Sham 3:15 — apoaap band, account safe, neend sari.
gu.audio_script: Apoaap band etle — auto square-off. TRADETRI pote sambhale, tension nathi.

hi.label: एक थैला
hi.explanation: Ek baar mein kitne shares lene padte hain. Nifty ka thaila = 75 shares — chhutak nahi milta.
hi.example: Nifty ka 1 thaila = 75 shares = ₹18 lakh ka exposure.
hi.audio_script: Ek thaila matlab — lot size. Ek baar mein 75 shares, kam nahi le sakte.

gu.label: એક થેલો
gu.explanation: Ek vakhat ma kitla shares levaa padshe. Nifty no thelo = 75 shares — chhutak na male.
gu.example: Nifty no 1 thelo = 75 shares = ₹18 lakh nu exposure.
gu.audio_script: Ek thelo etle — lot size. Ek vakhat ma 75 shares, kam na lai shaka.

hi.label: हिसाब
hi.explanation: Aaj ka net — kitna kamaya, kitna gaya, total kya bacha. Roz ka final score.
hi.example: Aaj ka hisaab: +₹2,340 — kamai mein.
hi.audio_script: Hisaab matlab — P&L. Roz ka net kamai-nuksan, ek number mein.

gu.label: હિસાબ
gu.explanation: Aaje no net — kitlu kamayu, kitlu gayu, total su bachyu. Roj no final score.
gu.example: Aaje no hisaab: +₹2,340 — kamai ma.
gu.audio_script: Hisaab etle — P&L. Roj no net kamai-khoṭ, ek number ma.

schema_documentation.structure: Each word has: id, category, and 3 language objects (en/hi/gu)

language_object_fields.term: Romanized version of the word in that language
language_object_fields.label: Native script version (Devanagari for Hindi, Gujarati script for Gujarati)
language_object_fields.explanation: Simple 1-2 sentence definition in that language
language_object_fields.audio_script: Conversational version optimized for ElevenLabs TTS

schema_documentation.default_display: Show 'label' (native script) as primary, 'term' (romanized) as subtext for readability
schema_documentation.popup_content: explanation + example, with audio button playing audio_script

next_steps: 1. Vadodara native speaker review of all Gujarati translations (must)
3. ElevenLabs voice generation for all audio_script entries (60 audio files)
4. Add 20 more words in v2 based on user behavior data
5. Add video URLs (30-second explainer for each word) in v2
